scripts.migrate: cd api && dotnet ef migrations add
scripts.db:update: cd api && dotnet ef database update --project SekaiLib.csproj
scripts.db:reset: cd api && dotnet ef database drop --force --project SekaiLib.csproj && dotnet ef database update --project SekaiLib.csproj
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --build
